---
title: "Shambhala Mirror standards"
# image: bristlecone.jpg
# image-alt: "The oldest living species of tree, the bristlecone pine, in the White Mountains of California."
# about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
---

Background

## History

A 5 year effort to look at the community and organization to describe how it's evolved.  

## Opportunity

The [https://mirror.shambhala.org](Shambhala Societal Mirror) has evolved incrementally over the years.  This standards site is an opportunity to look at its  current state and describe it in a way that accelerates the next phase of development.  The goal is to create a set of standards that can be used to guide the next phase of development.
